limitations: The GitHub-hosted runner image is named but not represented by an immutable runner-image digest; source, actions, base image, Python, uv, R, packages, and the built image identity are separately pinned or recorded.
The checksum-bound job-log transport binds retained bytes to recorded run metadata but is not a cryptographic GitHub attestation.
A separate exact-commit clean-clone replay of the durable audit tree remains pending for P006-AC-08.

This run covers only the named synthetic whole-text fixture suites and fixed worker boundary; it does not cover raw-text preprocessing, literary corpora, benchmark accuracy, public workflows, FAIR run export, or production isolation.

notes: Exact source 79cb268 passed normal Linux CI and a separate manual read-only capture. The fixed worker matched the checksum-frozen direct-stylo references for the named v2 fixtures, retained explicit boundary and failed-cell outcomes, passed changed-unknown and order-permutation checks, and exposed no shell or code channel in the fixed-adapter injection probe. The complete 18-file package was transported through a checksum-bound job log, independently extracted, re-read from the persisted tree, and published in evidence-only commit 7359cbe, whose sole parent is the capture source; normal publication CI passed. Earlier dispatches 29333474110 and 29335197916 published no evidence and are retained as diagnostic failures: they exposed an over-broad execution rejection followed by read-only renv lock/synchronization CPU exhaustion. The fix disabled runtime mutation without changing R, stylo, fixtures, tolerances, methods, seed, locale, or worker limits. This run passes P006-AC-07 only within its declared fixture-local boundary; exact-commit clean-clone closure for P006-AC-08 remains pending.
